name: Unknown Examiner

personality.personality_notes: Very friendly, puts candidates at ease. Spent first 20 minutes in casual conversation about maritime career and experience. Questions asked in no particular order — jumped between topics. Did NOT want flashcard answers — pushed candidates who gave textbook responses to explain practically. Discussed topics at length rather than rapid-fire questioning.

likes: Candidates who can discuss topics conversationally
Those who admit when unsure rather than bluffing
dislikes: Flashcard answers — actively pushes back on these
Candidates who don't relate answers to their own vessel

known_questions: What equipment do you have on the bridge
APEM — stopped candidate halfway through Appraisal
Variation and deviation significance and causes
AIS how it works and disadvantages, who must have it
Safety contour and safety depth configuration
Showed ECDIS screenshot — find the variation
COLREGS scenarios on slideshow: NUC, PDV, fishing vessel, towing RAM >200m
Buoyage identification: lateral IALA A, cardinal marks, emergency wreck, preferred channel
GPS failure — what stops working, actions, coastal position fixing
Synoptic chart identification, weather prediction methods
Rule 19 with radar screen, WAO triangle, trial manoeuvre
Parallel indexing — what it is and why not use a buoy
report_references: OOW 3000GT Yacht Orals Report - Sep 2024 - Pass
